caption: A news broadcast features a split-screen display with two men. On the left, a man wearing a red traditional cap and a grey patterned garment speaks. To the right, another man wearing a grey cap, glasses, and a grey garment listens, resting his chin on his hand. The background is a neutral, indoor setting. Overlaid on the bottom of the screen is a magenta bar with the text "PLUS POLITICS" and a larger white headline that reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". A white footer contains social media icons and the text "FOLLOW US", "LUSTVAFRICA", and "SUBSCRIBE" along with the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA". A "plustv" logo appears in the top left corners of the video feeds. Across the frames, the man on the left continues to speak while the man on the right remains in a listening posture, with the on-screen text remaining constant except for the footer, which changes to "WATCH ONLINE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV".
